On Vue Props and One-Way Data Flow
Notes on an interesting case with Vue's one-way data flow on Props, and how to handle it.
You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now? - React Components & Props - (6)
You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now?

Time to talk about components. If you're a Vue developer, the component concept is probably second nature to you already. So what about React? How do React components work? In this post we'll walk through React components, nested components, Props (and the fact that they're read-only), and how to fake Vue's slot behavior using children.
